auditor: independent read-only subagent with repo-safe sanitization

checks.name: no_backend_live_server_adapter_runtime_desktop_changes
evidence: Tracked production diff is limited to web_design_ui/index.html and web_design_ui/styles/overview.css.
No live server, command adapter, runtime, or desktop files are modified.

checks.name: tiny_repairs_are_html_css_only
evidence: The overview sync action keeps data-ui-action="sync_runtime" unchanged and only changes visible compact operator copy.
CSS changes adjust secondary action spacing, button label wrapping, and API table minimum width.
No dispatch, payload, metadata, availability, refresh, or truth handling changes are present.

checks.name: browser_smoke_pass
evidence: Browser smoke result is PASS.
Eight screens and two modal surfaces are covered.
Ten screenshot files exist under the contour screenshot directory.

checks.name: setup_select_import_inert
evidence: Setup, Select Client, and Import Existing report zero data-ui-action controls.
Those screens report zero live/action class controls, zero enabled buttons, and zero file inputs.
Those screens do not expose path-like sensitive payload text in the smoke metrics.

checks.name: no_final_confirm_or_command_execution
evidence: browser smoke final_confirm_clicked=false
browser smoke command_request_executed=false
browser smoke runtime_mutation_attempted=false

checks.name: no_new_action_surface
evidence: Matrix records new_action_surface_added=false.
Smoke records no enabled active data actions in fixture screens.
No new data-ui-action attribute appears in the diff.

checks.name: no_runtime_overclaim
evidence: Smoke reports hasOverclaim=false for all screen and modal cases.
Scoped overclaim scan returned no matches outside prohibition text.

checks.name: blocker_classification_present
evidence: Matrix includes freeze-blocking visual, freeze-blocking truth/copy, post-owner-review design preference, and deferred desktop-only classifications.
Freeze-blocking visual and truth/copy blockers are empty after the tiny repair and smoke rerun.

checks.name: repo_safe_artifacts
evidence: Contour artifacts contain no private service traces.
Smoke source is fixture/demo only.
Screenshots are local repo audit artifacts.

residual_risks: Owner may still request design preference changes after manual review.
Native desktop behavior remains deferred until explicit owner approval.
Smoke is fixture/demo only and does not prove live runtime behavior.
